name: Match Generation & Notification Delivery Reimplementation
objective: Replace Python worker proxy routes with Next.js Server Actions using Supabase service_role for match generation and notification delivery
exit_criteria: All 6 API routes no longer proxy to Python worker
Match generation service implements cosine similarity scoring in TypeScript
Notification engine supports send, digest, and cleanup operations
All unit tests pass with >90% coverage
All integration tests pass against mock Supabase
No references to PYTHON_WORKER_URL in match/notification code
Service uses Supabase service_role client for server-side operations
